summary: Iteration 104 - Quote Builder Premium UI + Quotes List View. All 24 features tested and verified working. Backend API (GET /api/quotes/all) returns quotes with lead data. Frontend Quotes page shows stats strip, tab row, quote list table. QuoteBuilderModal has two-column layout with pipeline bar, client card, line items, totals, and right sidebar with value summary, send button, client preview, and saved packages.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/quotes/all endpoint correctly returns quotes with associated lead data (clientName, clientEmail, projectTitle, serviceType, projectType, keyDate, eventDate)
Quotes.tsx correctly implements full-page Quotes list view with data-testid='quotes-page'
Stats strip shows 4 metrics (Sent, Total value, Awaiting approval, Acceptance rate) with real-time calculation
Tab row shows 6 pill-style tabs (All/Draft/Sent/Viewed/Approved/Declined) with count badges and client-side filtering
Quote list table shows client avatar, name, project type, quote number, status badge, sent date, and value
EmptyState component renders correctly when no quotes exist
QuoteBuilderModal has two-column layout (left builder, right 220px sidebar)
Pipeline bar shows 4 steps (Client/Line items/Review/Send) with correct visual states - NOT clickable (visual only)
Client card shows avatar, name, email, project type badge, and 3-column details grid
Line items card with Description/Qty/Price columns, inline editing, add/remove items working
Totals card shows subtotal, discount, tax (editable), and total with real-time recalculation
Right sidebar shows value summary with real-time total and status pill
Send button in sidebar shows 'Send to [name] →'
Client preview thumbnail shows lead name, valid date, skeleton lines, and total
Saved packages section shows 'Save your first package →' when empty
Save draft button works - saves quote and closes modal
Close button and Escape key both close the modal correctly
Dashboard content (nudge, active commissions, widgets) hidden when Quotes view is active
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test quote (Q-2026-001, $500, Draft) for Emma Wilson during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 104 complete. Quotes page and QuoteBuilderModal fully working. Key test IDs: quotes-page, quotes-topbar, new-quote-btn, quotes-stats-strip, stat-sent, stat-total-value, stat-awaiting-approval, stat-acceptance-rate, quotes-tab-row, quotes-tab-{all|draft|sent|viewed|approved|declined}, quotes-list-table, quote-row-{id}, quote-builder-modal, pipeline-bar, client-card, line-items-card, line-item-{index}, line-desc-{index}, line-qty-{index}, line-price-{index}, add-line-item-btn, totals-card, quote-total, value-summary, sidebar-send-btn, save-first-package-btn, save-draft-btn, send-quote-btn. Industry language correctly applied (Photography: Quotes, Quote, Client, Shoot date, + New Quote). One test quote exists in the system.

Backend_GET_quotes_all.details: GET /api/quotes/all returns quotes array with lead data

Backend_quotes_required_fields.details: Quotes have id, quoteNumber, status, total, createdAt fields

Sidebar_quotes_navigation.details: Clicking sidebar-quotes navigates to Quotes page

Dashboard_content_hidden.details: Dashboard widgets hidden when Quotes view is active

New_quote_button.details: + New Quote button present and clickable

Stats_strip_4_metrics.details: Shows Sent, Total value, Awaiting approval, Acceptance rate

Empty_state_renders.details: EmptyState component shows when no quotes exist

Quote_list_table.details: Table shows client, quote #, status, sent date, value columns

Modal_opens.details: QuoteBuilderModal opens on + New Quote click

Modal_header.details: Shows title, subtitle, save/send buttons, close button

Pipeline_bar.details: 4 steps (Client/Line items/Review/Send) - visual only, not clickable

Client_card.details: Avatar, name, email, project type badge, 3-col details grid

Totals_card.details: Subtotal, discount, tax (editable), total with real-time calc

Value_summary_sidebar.details: Real-time total, status pill in right sidebar

Client_preview_thumbnail.details: Shows lead name, valid date, skeleton lines, total

Saved_packages_empty.details: Shows 'Save your first package →' when empty
